maps.name: Abandoned Corner Lot
maps.description: A neglected urban lot, thick with litter and cracked concrete.

maps.name: Garden Shed
maps.description: A dusty shed. Tools hang on the walls. Something stirs in the corner.

entities.name: Rusty Watering Can
entities.description: A battered old can. Still holds water.

entities.name: Saguaro Seedling
entities.description: Slow-growing desert giant. Requires warm zone.

entities.name: Broken Greenhouse
entities.description: Restore it to shelter cold-zone plants.

nodes.speaker: Wildflower Seed
nodes.text: Hello, Gardner. Please use the hoe to prepare the soil for me so I can grow well.

nodes.speaker: Wildflower Seed
nodes.text: Make sure you have this item before trying o plant me
